patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/io/crate/types/ResultSetParser.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['// It\'s NOT char(1) which is actually "character".', '// It\'s char with OID 18, ie single byte "char" which can store single ASCII character.', '// See also https://www.postgresql.org/docs/15/datatype-character.html#DATATYPE-CHARACTER-SPECIAL-TABLE', 'String str = resultSet.getString(columnIndex);', 'if (str == null) {', 'return str;'], removed_lines=['String strValue = resultSet.getString(columnIndex);', 'if (strValue == null) {', 'return Byte.valueOf(strValue);'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]

file_mappings.reasoning: Phase 0 Optimistic Patch — git apply and tests passed.

steps.description: Apply patch directly — clean git apply.
